title: <div>Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Florida Luxury Waterfron
content:
Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Florida Luxury Waterfront Properties

This Agreement is established between UltiTool Media LLC. ("Service Provider") and Florida Luxury Waterfront Properties ("Client").

1. Introduction

UltiTool Media LLC. commits to providing comprehensive marketing and advertising services aimed at enhancing the visibility and appeal of the Client's high-value beachfront properties. This encompasses strategic content creation, social media management, paid advertising, SEO and web management, and email marketing strategies.

2. Scope of Work

The Service Provider commits to a comprehensive strategy focusing on the following key areas:

Content Creation and Management:

- Property Selection and Presentation: Selection and presentation of standout properties, supported by engaging narratives and visuals. Tools: Adobe Creative Cloud/Canva.
- Estimated Hours: 10 hours at $75/hour.

- Social Media and Website Integration and Management: Ensuring brand consistency across digital platforms, optimizing content for engagement and SEO. Tools: Hootsuite, Buffer.
